title: Rad's Lush Foliage
description: Fuller lush visuals for all kinds of foliage.
body:
# A pack for all your foliage needs.

_Pack by RadGamerAwesome_

_The glorification of grass._

_This resource pack functions in vanilla minecraft and does not require any mods or shaders._

## Features
- Extra volume added to most plant and bush variants.

_View gallery
for images_

## List of changes
- Added a new model for some plants and bushes that gives a more lush, volumetric look, while keeping a vanilla feel.

<details>
<summary>List of modified blocks</summary>

  Short Grass\
  Tall Grass\
  Fern\
  Large Fern\
  Bush\
  Firefly Bush\
  Short Dry Grass\
  Tall Dry Grass\
  Cactus Flower\
  Sweet Berry Bush\
  Glow Berry Plant\
  Lilac\
  Peony\
  Rose Bush\
  Crimson Roots\
  Warped Roots
</details>

## Compatibility with other resource packs and shaders

This pack functions with most resource packs, including both high and low resolution packs.

When using this pack with other resource packs place it under the selected pack to prioritize their textures and models.

<details>
<summary>Example (Resource pack selection ingame)</summary>

![Rads lush foliage placed under the priority pack in the resource pack menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97052e352b5b02fff1490888ba48e066d65749bf.png)

</details>

If you want to prioritize the features in this resource pack, simply place it over the pack that you want overridden.

This pack also functions with most shaders.

## Things that might cause this pack to break

Any pack that manipulates the item models of the listed blocks may override this resource pack, but most packs should be compatible.

The order of activated packs may cause this pack to be overridden.

## Packs and shaders used in images:
[Fresh Animations (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

[Complementary (Shaders)](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)

[Fast Better Grass (Resource Pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)

[Whimscape (Resource pack)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

And Rad's Lush Foliage!
